full_text:
Xun Qi (Boqi) иҚҖзҘҲ (дјҜж——)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Qi (иҚҖзҘҲ), styledBoqi (дјҜж——). First cousin of Xun You, discussed law with Kong Rong. Xun Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
